questions.subject: History
questions.prompt: Which of the following best describes the primary subject matter of the 'Tarikh-e-Khandan-e-Timuriyah'?

options.text: A collection of Vedic rituals and astronomical observations.
A detailed history of Timur and his Mughal descendants.
A manual on the techniques of Mughal miniature painting.
A legal code established during the reign of Emperor Akbar.

questions.explanation: The Tarikh-e-Khandan-e-Timuriyah is a 16th-century illustrated manuscript that documents the history of Timur and his Mughal descendants.
questions.takeaway: The Tarikh-e-Khandan-e-Timuriyah serves as a genealogical and historical record of the Timurid lineage in the Mughal context.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: A 16th-century illustrated manuscript, commissioned by Emperor Akbar in 1577-78 A.D, documenting the history of Timur and his Mughal descendants.
